common.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to view the {{module}} module for this server.

subtitle.selectServer: Choose a community to unlock guild tools.
subtitle.needsSetup: Lucky is not installed in this server yet.
subtitle.ready: Guild command center is ready for operations.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Operational overview and key status signals for your server.

servers.title: Servers
servers.subtitle: Review installation status and manage your eligible communities.

serverSettings.title: Server Settings
serverSettings.subtitle: Configure bot behaviour, channels, roles, and preferences.

moderation.title: Mod Cases
moderation.subtitle: Review and manage moderation actions for this server.

autoMod.title: Auto-Moderation
autoMod.subtitle: Configure automated rule enforcement and filters.

serverLogs.title: Server Logs
serverLogs.subtitle: Inspect audit events and bot activity records.

customCommands.title: Custom Commands
customCommands.subtitle: Create and manage custom slash commands for this server.

autoMessages.title: Auto Messages
autoMessages.subtitle: Schedule recurring messages to any channel.

embedBuilder.title: Embed Builder
embedBuilder.subtitle: Design and send rich Discord embeds.

reactionRoles.title: Reaction Roles
reactionRoles.subtitle: Assign roles based on member emoji reactions.

levels.title: Level System
levels.subtitle: Configure XP, level roles, and leaderboards.

starboard.title: Starboard
starboard.subtitle: Surface popular messages to a dedicated channel.

lyrics.title: Lyrics
lyrics.subtitle: Fetch and display song lyrics in your server.

lastFm.title: Last.fm
lastFm.subtitle: Control account linking and scrobble attribution behavior.

twitch.title: Twitch Notifications
twitch.subtitle: Post live alerts when tracked streamers go online.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Toggle bot feature modules for your server.

trackHistory.title: Track History
trackHistory.subtitle: Inspect recent playback and requester activity.

music.title: Music Player
music.subtitle: Manage queue, autoplay, and real-time playback controls.

preferredArtists.title: Musical Taste
preferredArtists.subtitle: Tune autoplay taste preferences and artist priorities.

spotify.title: Spotify
spotify.subtitle: Link or unlink Spotify to power autoplay matching.

fallback.title: Lucky Dashboard
fallback.subtitle: Configure modules, moderation, and engagement workflows.

meta.title: Lucky — A Discord bot you can actually self-host
meta.description: Open-source Discord bot with music, moderation, custom commands, and a web dashboard. Free forever. Run it on your own box.

hero.subtitle: Music, moderation, custom commands, and a full web dashboard. Use the hosted version in two clicks, or run it on your own box if you'd rather.

repoCard.name: LucasSantana-Dev / Lucky
repoCard.description: Self-hosted Discord music bot — Spotify + YouTube + SoundCloud, autoplay recommendations, React dashboard, moderation suite.

data.title: Your guild data stays yours
data.description: Postgres, Redis, your hardware. No third-party ToS over your community. Export and migrate any time.

fork.title: Fork the source
fork.description: TypeScript monorepo. Add commands, change behavior, swap providers without waiting on a roadmap or paying for an API tier.

free.title: Free, with no premium tier
free.description: No feature paywall, no Patreon, no rate-limited tier. Apache 2.0. The hosted version exists for people who don't want to run a box.

commands.heading: 100+ commands, scoped to what you actually run

play.name: /play
play.description: Queue a track from Spotify, YouTube, or SoundCloud

queue.name: /queue
queue.description: Inspect or reorder the current queue

ban.name: /mod ban
ban.description: Tempban with reason, auto-DM, audit-log entry

automod.name: /automod
automod.description: Spam, caps, links, invites — per-guild rules

stack.heading: For developers — what you're running
stack.subheading: Standard Node + Postgres stack. Nothing exotic. `docker compose up` and you're online. Skip this if you're using the hosted version.

bot.name: lucky-bot
bot.description: discord.js client, Lavalink-free audio via yt-dlp + Opus

backend.name: lucky-backend
backend.description: Express API, OAuth, Prisma to Postgres

frontend.name: lucky-frontend
frontend.description: React 19 + Vite + Tailwind, Discord OAuth dashboard

postgres.name: postgres
postgres.description: Guild config, custom commands, moderation log

redis.name: redis
redis.description: Session cache, rate-limit buckets, autoplay state

footerRepo.heading: Open source under Apache 2.0
footerRepo.subheading: Fork it, contribute, run it, deploy your own. The code is the spec.

footer.tagline: Open-source Discord bot. Run it yourself or use the hosted version.
footer.supportCopy: Issues and PRs welcome on GitHub. Or hop in the Discord support server.

features.heading: What Lucky does
features.subheading: Everything most servers need, in one bot. No premium tier paywalling the good parts.

music.title: Music with smart autoplay
music.description: Queue from Spotify, YouTube, or SoundCloud. Autoplay matches the mood and won't drift into the wrong language.

moderation.title: Moderation that doesn't sleep
moderation.description: Auto-mod for spam, caps, links, and invites. Tempbans with reasons, audit log entries, and per-server rules.

customCommands.title: Custom commands
customCommands.description: Build replies, role-toggles, embeds, and shortcuts without writing code. Variable interpolation included.

dashboard.title: A real web dashboard
dashboard.description: Configure everything from your browser. Discord OAuth login, no JSON files, no SSH.

embeds.title: Embed builder
embeds.description: Compose rich Discord embeds with a live preview. Save templates, send on schedule, edit in place.

meta.title: Login - Lucky
meta.description: Login to Lucky Dashboard to manage your Discord servers

login.headline: Manage your Discord servers
login.description: Configure moderation, custom commands, music, and more — all in one place.
login.permissionsNote: Your guild permissions and bot controls are tied to your Discord account.
